description: Comedy club/improv venues across 5 major US cities — Vivid Seats API IDs verified
purpose: Monitor for comedians blowing up at small rooms before they graduate to theaters/arenas. When a comedian has high secondary prices HERE, they are about to explode.

Los Angeles.name: The Comedy Store
Los Angeles.note: THE comedy club. Every big comedian has a story here

Los Angeles.name: Improv Comedy Club Hollywood
Los Angeles.note: Major touring comics do weekends here

Los Angeles.name: Laugh Factory Hollywood
Los Angeles.note: Netflix Is A Joke Fest venue

Nashville.name: Zanies Comedy Club
Nashville.note: Only dedicated comedy club in Nashville

Washington DC.name: DC Improv
Washington DC.note: DC premium market + high show volume = goldmine

Philadelphia.name: Helium Comedy Club
Philadelphia.note: Highest show volume of any club. Comics test material here

San Francisco.name: Punch Line SF
San Francisco.note: Tiny room, high volume. Legendary SF comedy

San Francisco.name: Cobbs Comedy Club
San Francisco.note: MOST shows of any club. Every touring comic hits Cobbs

Pittsburgh.name: Pittsburgh Improv
Pittsburgh.note: Home market. 126 upcoming shows. Prices cap at $99 (Pittsburgh multiplier). Signal is sell-through not price.

New York City.name: Carolines on Broadway
New York City.note: CLOSED / no listings on secondary market

New York City.name: Comedy Cellar
New York City.note: Sells direct only. Not scannable via secondary market

note: NYC clubs sell direct (Comedy Cellar, Gotham, Carolines). Pittsburgh Improv is scannable but prices cap at $99 — signal is in sell-through rate, not price. LA/Chicago/DC/Philly/SF/Nashville are the best signal markets.
